title: Buyer creates a dropship PO from a sale order
user_persona: Order management buyer handling a dropship sale

conversation.user: Customer placed sale order SO-2026-441 and we need to dropship from supplier SUP-DROP-3. Create the PO.

bot_must: fire entry-screen search POCRTSOTRN1 with sale_order_no=SO-2026-441
note this is a dropship flow (PoCrtSo inherently dropships from supplier to customer)

conversation.user: Yes, found it. Use everything from the SO and just confirm.

bot_must: load main screen with SO defaults
copy customer address as dropship address (no PoCrtDrpshp sub-screen needed — PoCrtSo handles this implicitly)
ask user to confirm before commit

conversation.user: All confirmed. Create and approve in one go.

bot_must: if user has approval rights: result is Approved status; if not: result is Draft pending approval
report new PO number and link to source SO
expected.notes_for_evaluator: PoCrtSo has POCRTSOSUB as commit. There is no separate Approve task in PoCrtSo's TRANS set (only Search + Submit). Approval is via PoApp.

evaluation_metrics.dropship_inherent: bot must NOT navigate PoCrtDrpshp splice — PoCrtSo handles dropship implicitly
